queries.question: What core concepts is Charlie studying?
queries.sql:
select c.concept_name  
from EnrolledStudents e
inner join Students t on t.id = e.student_id
inner join School_Subjects s on s.subject_id = e.subject_id
left join Core_Concepts c on s.core_concept_id = c.concept_id
where t.name = 'Charlie'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?concept_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?t a :Students .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?t .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?t p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
}

queries.question: What core concepts are associated with the highest grade?
queries.sql:
select c.concept_name
from EnrolledStudents e
inner join School_Subjects s on s.subject_id = e.subject_id
inner join Core_Concepts c on s.core_concept_id = c.concept_id
order by e.grade desc limit 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?concept_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which of the advanced topics are associated with the highest grade?
queries.sql:
select c.topic_name
from EnrolledStudents e
inner join School_Subjects s on s.subject_id = e.subject_id
inner join Advanced_Topics c on s.Advanced_Topic_id = c.topic_id
order by e.grade desc limit 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Advanced_Topics .
  ?s p:hasAdvanced_Topics ?c .
  ?c p:topic_name ?topic_name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which core concepts and advanced topics are associated with the highest scores?
queries.sql:
select c.concept_name, at.topic_name
from EnrolledStudents e
inner join School_Subjects s on s.subject_id = e.subject_id
inner join Core_Concepts c on s.core_concept_id = c.concept_id
inner join Advanced_Topics at on s.Advanced_Topic_id = at.topic_id
order by e.grade desc limit 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?concept_name ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?at a :Advanced_Topics .
  ?s p:hasAdvanced_Topics ?at .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?at p:topic_name ?topic_name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What topic is Charlie studying?
queries.sql:
select c.concept_name, at.topic_name   
from EnrolledStudents e
inner join Students t on t.id = e.student_id
inner join School_Subjects s on s.subject_id = e.subject_id
left join Core_Concepts c on s.core_concept_id = c.concept_id
left join Advanced_Topics at on s.Advanced_Topic_id = at.topic_id
where t.name = 'Charlie'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?concept_name ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?t a :Students .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?t .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?at a :Advanced_Topics .
  ?s p:hasAdvanced_Topics ?at .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?at p:topic_name ?topic_name .
  ?t p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What topic is Charlie studying?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?concept_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?t a :Students .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?t .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?t p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?t a :Students .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?t .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Advanced_Topics .
  ?s p:hasAdvanced_Topics ?c .
  ?c p:topic_name ?topic_name .
  ?t p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
} }
  full: { SELECT ?concept_name ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?t a :Students .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?t .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?at a :Advanced_Topics .
  ?s p:hasAdvanced_Topics ?at .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?at p:topic_name ?topic_name .
  ?t p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
} }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which curriculum topics are associated with the highest grade?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?concept_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Advanced_Topics .
  ?s p:hasAdvanced_Topics ?c .
  ?c p:topic_name ?topic_name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?concept_name ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?s a :School_Subjects .
  ?e p:hasSchool_Subjects ?s .
  ?c a :Core_Concepts .
  ?s p:hasCore_Concepts ?c .
  ?at a :Advanced_Topics .
  ?s p:hasAdvanced_Topics ?at .
  ?c p:concept_name ?concept_name .
  ?at p:topic_name ?topic_name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
